application_purpose: SPRIN is a comprehensive police personnel and organizational management system for POLRES Samosir

core_functionality.personnel_management: Manage police personnel data, assignments, and career progression
core_functionality.organizational_structure: Manage police units, departments, and hierarchical structure
core_functionality.calendar_system: Schedule and manage police duties, events, and activities
core_functionality.reporting: Generate reports and analytics for management decisions

technical_architecture.database: MySQL database accessed via PDO with prepared statements
technical_architecture.api: RESTful API endpoints returning JSON responses
technical_architecture.frontend: Bootstrap 5 responsive design with custom CSS
technical_architecture.error_handling: Comprehensive error reporting system with development/production modes

development_guidelines.code_standards: Follow PSR-12 coding standards, use strict typing, implement proper error handling
development_guidelines.security: Always validate user input, use prepared statements, implement proper authentication checks
development_guidelines.performance: Optimize database queries, implement caching where appropriate, minimize API calls
development_guidelines.testing: Use Puppeteer for E2E testing, test API endpoints, validate responsive design

ai_assistance_focus: Debug PHP syntax and runtime errors
Enhance responsive design and user experience
